seo.title: Top 10 Things to Do in Moscow, Russia

places.name: Saint Basil's Cathedral
places.description: An iconic multi-domed cathedral standing proudly at the southern end of Red Square.

places.description: The sacred heart of the Kremlin, enclosed by majestic, historic cathedrals.

places.description: The historic cradle of Russian opera and ballet performance art.

places.description: A cutting-edge urban park showcasing Russia's diverse botanical zones and a panoramic floating bridge.

places.name: State Tretyakov Gallery
places.description: The premier museum dedicated exclusively to the history of fine art in Russia.

places.description: A massive architectural park celebrating achievements in design, space, and culture.

places.name: Kolomenskoye Park
places.description: A stunning historic reserve on a scenic hill overlooking the Moskva River.
